title: Servlet Request-Response Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the lifecycle and data flow of an HTTP request through a Java Servlet container
relationships: Client sends HTTP Request to Web Server
Web Server forwards request to Servlet Container
Container creates Servlet instance and calls init() method
Container calls service() method (e.g., doGet(), doPost())
Servlet processes request, interacts with resources
Container sends response back to Client
Container may call destroy() method when needed
